We need to determine the falling distance using d = k*t^2. Let me find k from the examples.
I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

t = 2.52s, d = 37.78m:
t^2 = 2.52 * 2.52:
2.52 * 0.02 = 0.0504
2.52 * 0.50 = 1.2600
2.52 * 2.00 = 5.0400
0.0504 + 1.2600 = 1.3104
1.3104 + 5.0400 = 6.3504
k = 37.78 / 2.52^2 = 37.78 / 6.3504 = 37.780 / 6.350
= 0 + 1 * 37780 / 6350
= 1 + 1 * 31430 / 6350
= 2 + 1 * 25080 / 6350
= 3 + 1 * 18730 / 6350
= 4 + 1 * 12380 / 6350
= 5 + 1 * 6030 / 6350
= 5.0 + 0.1 * 60300 / 6350
= 5.1 + 0.1 * 53950 / 6350
= 5.2 + 0.1 * 47600 / 6350
= 5.3 + 0.1 * 41250 / 6350
= 5.4 + 0.1 * 34900 / 6350
= 5.5 + 0.1 * 28550 / 6350
= 5.6 + 0.1 * 22200 / 6350
= 5.7 + 0.1 * 15850 / 6350
= 5.8 + 0.1 * 9500 / 6350
= 5.9 + 0.1 * 3150 / 6350
= 5.90 + 0.01 * 31500 / 6350
= 5.91 + 0.01 * 25150 / 6350
= 5.92 + 0.01 * 18800 / 6350
= 5.93 + 0.01 * 12450 / 6350
= 5.94 + 0.01 * 6100 / 6350
= 5.940 + 0.001 * 61000 / 6350
= 5.941 + 0.001 * 54650 / 6350
= 5.942 + 0.001 * 48300 / 6350
= 5.943 + 0.001 * 41950 / 6350
= 5.944 + 0.001 * 35600 / 6350
= 5.945 + 0.001 * 29250 / 6350
= 5.946 + 0.001 * 22900 / 6350
= 5.947 + 0.001 * 16550 / 6350
= 5.948 + 0.001 * 10200 / 6350
= 5.949 + 0.001 * 3850 / 6350
= 5.949

t = 2.64s, d = 41.47m:
t^2 = 2.64 * 2.64:
2.64 * 0.04 = 0.1056
2.64 * 0.60 = 1.5840
2.64 * 2.00 = 5.2800
0.1056 + 1.5840 = 1.6896
1.6896 + 5.2800 = 6.9696
k = 41.47 / 2.64^2 = 41.47 / 6.9696 = 41.470 / 6.969
= 0 + 1 * 41470 / 6969
= 1 + 1 * 34501 / 6969
= 2 + 1 * 27532 / 6969
= 3 + 1 * 20563 / 6969
= 4 + 1 * 13594 / 6969
= 5 + 1 * 6625 / 6969
= 5.0 + 0.1 * 66250 / 6969
= 5.1 + 0.1 * 59281 / 6969
= 5.2 + 0.1 * 52312 / 6969
= 5.3 + 0.1 * 45343 / 6969
= 5.4 + 0.1 * 38374 / 6969
= 5.5 + 0.1 * 31405 / 6969
= 5.6 + 0.1 * 24436 / 6969
= 5.7 + 0.1 * 17467 / 6969
= 5.8 + 0.1 * 10498 / 6969
= 5.9 + 0.1 * 3529 / 6969
= 5.90 + 0.01 * 35290 / 6969
= 5.91 + 0.01 * 28321 / 6969
= 5.92 + 0.01 * 21352 / 6969
= 5.93 + 0.01 * 14383 / 6969
= 5.94 + 0.01 * 7414 / 6969
= 5.95 + 0.01 * 445 / 6969
= 5.950 + 0.001 * 4450 / 6969
= 5.950

t = 1.16s, d = 8.01m:
t^2 = 1.16 * 1.16:
1.16 * 0.06 = 0.0696
1.16 * 0.10 = 0.1160
1.16 * 1.00 = 1.1600
0.0696 + 0.1160 = 0.1856
0.1856 + 1.1600 = 1.3456
k = 8.01 / 1.16^2 = 8.01 / 1.3456 = 8.010 / 1.345
= 0 + 1 * 8010 / 1345
= 1 + 1 * 6665 / 1345
= 2 + 1 * 5320 / 1345
= 3 + 1 * 3975 / 1345
= 4 + 1 * 2630 / 1345
= 5 + 1 * 1285 / 1345
= 5.0 + 0.1 * 12850 / 1345
= 5.1 + 0.1 * 11505 / 1345
= 5.2 + 0.1 * 10160 / 1345
= 5.3 + 0.1 * 8815 / 1345
= 5.4 + 0.1 * 7470 / 1345
= 5.5 + 0.1 * 6125 / 1345
= 5.6 + 0.1 * 4780 / 1345
= 5.7 + 0.1 * 3435 / 1345
= 5.8 + 0.1 * 2090 / 1345
= 5.9 + 0.1 * 745 / 1345
= 5.90 + 0.01 * 7450 / 1345
= 5.91 + 0.01 * 6105 / 1345
= 5.92 + 0.01 * 4760 / 1345
= 5.93 + 0.01 * 3415 / 1345
= 5.94 + 0.01 * 2070 / 1345
= 5.95 + 0.01 * 725 / 1345
= 5.950 + 0.001 * 7250 / 1345
= 5.951 + 0.001 * 5905 / 1345
= 5.952 + 0.001 * 4560 / 1345
= 5.953 + 0.001 * 3215 / 1345
= 5.954 + 0.001 * 1870 / 1345
= 5.955 + 0.001 * 525 / 1345
= 5.955

k values: 5.949, 5.950, 5.955
k values (sorted): 5.949, 5.950, 5.955
The median k is 5.950.

For t = 1.49:
t^2 = 1.49 * 1.49:
1.49 * 0.09 = 0.1341
1.49 * 0.40 = 0.5960
1.49 * 1.00 = 1.4900
0.1341 + 0.5960 = 0.7301
0.7301 + 1.4900 = 2.2201
= 2.2201

d = 5.95 * 2.2201:
5.95 * 0.0001 = 0.000595
5.95 * 0.0200 = 0.119000
5.95 * 0.2000 = 1.190000
5.95 * 2.0000 = 11.900000
0.000595 + 0.119000 = 0.119595
0.119595 + 1.190000 = 1.309595
1.309595 + 11.900000 = 13.209595
= 13.209

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{13.209}
